summary: All locally HIGH/BLOCKER citation contexts have a source-bounded local review and explicit boundary action. Fresh independent citation-context review remains required before formal submission.

reviewed_contexts.source_group: Grossman Health Capital; WHO HALE; NICE QALY

references.title: On the Concept of Health Capital and the Demand for Health

reviewed_contexts.used_for: 把日历寿命转译为健康质量、有效时间和质量调整时间。
reviewed_contexts.supports: T -> E 的测量语言和健康质量调整视角。
reviewed_contexts.does_not_support: 不能完整定义主体连续性，也不能替代个体医学判断。
reviewed_contexts.action: Keep the context only as T -> E measurement language; keep fresh reviewer review required before formal submission.

source_findings.title: On the Concept of Health Capital and the Demand for Health
source_findings.source_role: Health capital lineage and economic-theory entry point.
source_findings.evidence_note: Crossref and RePEc verify the article metadata, DOI, Journal of Political Economy venue, year, and page range. The accessible metadata supports using the source as the health-capital lineage entry, but the local audit did not extract full-text passages because the available PDF is scanned/restricted.
source_findings.boundary: Do not let Grossman alone carry the claim that effective time includes agency, subject continuity, or future option value.
source_findings.action: Keep as lineage source; fresh reviewer should inspect full text if a stronger health-capital claim is made.

source_findings.title: Healthy life expectancy (HALE) metadata
source_findings.source_role: Official public-health metric for health-adjusted expected years.
source_findings.evidence_note: WHO defines HALE as the average years expected in full health and states that it captures fatal and non-fatal outcomes by adjusting life expectancy across health states.
source_findings.boundary: HALE is population-health measurement language; it does not define subject continuity, individual medical advice, agency, or future option value.

source_findings.title: Economic evaluation
source_findings.source_role: Policy evaluation language for QALYs and lifetime health effects.
source_findings.evidence_note: NICE states that health effects should be expressed in QALYs and explains that QALYs combine life expectancy with health-related quality of life within the model time horizon.
source_findings.boundary: QALY is a health-economic index with assumptions and valuation choices; it cannot fully represent dignity, identity continuity, agency, subjective time, or option space.
source_findings.action: Use for quality-adjusted time only; keep extra Human Infra fields for agency and option value.
